source: Google reviews via RestaurantGuru aggregation page (https://restaurantguru.com/Sammys-Bar-and-Grill-Huntley)
sortApplied: Prose-bearing first; then ranked by 5-star + prose length to approximate Highest filter
note: Headless Google Maps Reviews tab was not accessible from Playwright context (place panel did not surface Reviews UI). Aggregator route used per audit-skill bot-block matrix; all reviews are Google-sourced and tagged with reviewer date.

reviews.name: Rocco Filippi
reviews.text:
So we take a motorcycle ride up to More Brewing in Huntley and run into this very nice barkeep. We told her where we were going to eat while in town. She suggested Sammy's. So we gave them a try.
What a delightful surprise. All 4 of us were happy with the quick service and the waitress was on it when we made changes to our order from what was on the menu. "No problem!" she told us every time we added or deleted something that came in our choices. Drinks were delivered asap. And when the food arrived I was thinking how I was going to try and eat all of it there was so much.
The whole time we were there she came over and asked us if we needed anything. My cup of coffee never got empty. And her personality was right up there with the old "down home small town" theme. We had a wonderful conversation with her. She introduced us to not only the other waitress as we went along but with all the talk of how we really enjoyed the food and service she had the owner/cook come out and we forwarded our opinion to him and expressed how we felt. I then told them that I HAD to leave a review with context to the entire experience.
I would have to say as many greasy spoons as I have been to this one is at the top of my list. And the people with me would agree to that I am sure. If your in the mood for some great breakfast with good people and are really hungry this is the place for you. Oh, and did I say the prices were actually lower for once than what we received in return?!

reviews.name: David Vincent
reviews.text: Sammy's is a great place where you will not leave hungry. There are very typical selections of bar food here and a pile of it all appears to be made in house, it's really tasty. The service is great, to the point where the waitress recognized my friends, who are regulars, and knew what their orders would be. She recognized that I was not a regular and spent extra time ensuring she would get my order correct. Always looking forward to my next visit.

reviews.name: Megan Tinsley
reviews.text:
We stopped in late after a long day, drawn by the good reviews, and we were not disappointed! The curly fries were perfectly cooked, and my husband's tater tots were excellent. The vegetable soup was wonderful, and the pulled pork sandwich was tasty. It's a great local spot with delicious food. I would definitely stop in again. Thanks!
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Dinner

reviews.name: Katie Smith
reviews.text:
Hidden gem. You wouldn't think it driving up but this place is literally AMAZING. Parking behind building provides plenty of spots and can enter through back door.
Very very very friendly staff.
Very delicious food.
Amazing selection of food.
Coffee is delicious
Love love love love this place. New favorite spot!

reviews.name: Derek Petrucci Jr
reviews.text: Great family place , good is fantastic. Sammy is one of the best guys around hands down Sammy’s is home . Whether you just hang out have a drink or pull up with your girl listen to the bands . Hang out with your family or friends. Great casual place with a great atmosphere.
reviews.recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Fried Shrimp with Curly Fries, Italian Omelette, Cheese Curds, Pretzel, Wings, Biscuits and Gravy, 2 Eggs, Soft Shell Tacos, Mozzarella Sticks, 4 Pieces French Toast, Ribeye Steak N' Eggs, Eggs Benedict, Corned Beef Hash Omelet, Side of Hash Browns, Hickory Burger, Breakfast Burrito, Pizza Omelette

reviews.name: Allen Halterman
reviews.text: It might not look like much from the outside, but this is a place not to miss! The staff is incredibly attentive and is able to offer solid recommendations for both food and drink. We don't live in the area, but we will come back every time we're visiting!

reviews.name: Adam Godwin
reviews.text: Absolutely love Sammys; they’re the best. Food is amazing and well-priced. Staff is very friendly and gives great service. The atmosphere is awesome. They will have live bands which are always entertaining, and dart nights which are fun. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.name: Carolyn Beranek
reviews.text:
The Fish Fry was very delicious.
Had the tater tots with clam chowder soup, which was the best we have ever had.
The only fault I had was the fish fell away from the breading. But that was a small con compared to the taste, and the service was excellent.
reviews.recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots

reviews.name: Katryn Lotto
reviews.text: This is a hidden gem. Service was fantastic, the ingredients were very fresh throughout and we both enjoyed the breakfasts we had. Prices are also reasonable. We will definitely be going back. We want to try lunch next!

reviews.name: Elayna Garcia
reviews.text: Love the atmosphere here! Really gives you the small town bar with many welcoming faces as soon as you step foot into the establishment. And it’s always better when I see Lola on the clock:).

reviews.name: Rick Ciesla
reviews.text: Finally made it out here. Fish fry was great, service very good. Place had a really friendly atmosphere, almost small town feel. I will be back to try the breakfast soon. Recommended.

reviews.name: Denise Andren
reviews.text: OMG the pretzel appetizer is HUGE!! It is very good. Went for the fish fry and was not disappointed. You get a lot of food for a very reasonable price. I really like Sammy's.
reviews.recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots, Pretzel, Biscuits and Gravy

reviews.name: Megan Van
reviews.text: Drinks were wonderful, food was even better. The portion sizes are huge. Staff was attentive and very friendly. 10/10 would be an understatement!

reviews.name: Chef Consultant
reviews.text:
Great little bar. Friendly staff & good quick bar food. Outdoor seating is available.
Service: Dine in
Meal type: Other
Price per person: $10–20

reviews.name: Dan Lockwitz
reviews.text: Mike and Diane have a great place in Huntley! Enjoyed the food, friendly service and listening to the music of the New Odyssey Guy.

reviews.name: Murugs Lingaswamy
reviews.text: People are very friendly. Very relaxed environment(more retired people too) with music, food and drinks with decent service,.

reviews.name: James Dunavan
reviews.text: The staff were friendly and got our order quickly. The food was great. I will definitely be coming here to eat more often.

reviews.name: Marty haugland
reviews.text:
Pizza omelet bursting with fresh ingredients.
Jen quick with coffee refills. Very generous portions, reasonable prices.

reviews.name: Jas F
reviews.text: Super place for great food and excellent service. Not fancy but a wonderful spot to chat with neighbors and friends!

reviews.name: Stephanie Hancock
reviews.text: A hidden little gem. Food is good quality and cooked with care. Good menu. Good service. Love bringing guests here.

reviews.name: Keith Rodgers
reviews.text: Great place to unwind. The staff and owners are very friendly. Tell Mickey and Kate said hi!

reviews.name: Kelsey Waughon
reviews.text: Love going to Sammy's on Tuesdays for karaoke night. The food and the service are great!

reviews.name: Nick Sanchez
reviews.text: Go hawks!!!! Always a good time nice big home town bar, great price, best happy hour.

reviews.name: Lee Arroyo
reviews.text: Great breakfast, great food, service is fantastic and people are lovely.

reviews.name: Antwaun Howard
reviews.text: The owner, staff, patrons are all awesome. My favorite bar in Huntley.

reviews.name: Steven Always Trying New Things
reviews.text:
Food is always good.
Like that they serve breakfast all day and night.

reviews.name: Bob Reed
reviews.text: Good times...great food specials and good bands play on the weekends.

reviews.name: Maria Lourdes H.
reviews.text: Love the Fish Fry all you can eat...atmosphere is awesome.
reviews.recommendedDishes: White Fish Fry with Tater Tots

reviews.name: Andrew Szekely
reviews.text: Everything you'd want in a hometown bar and restaurant!

reviews.name: Debbie Malley
reviews.text: GREAT food...EXCELLENT service...THANKS jessica!!!
